arts.ttl: Daniel Farke doubles down on Illan Meslier message as he responds to Leeds United criticism
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has doubled down on his decision to stick with Illan Meslier as Leeds United's first-choice goalkeeper and admitted there was: "Not one doubt in my mind." Illan is a self-critical young man, who was also not happy with his performance, but it was also no coincidence he was in the team of the year last season at Championship level.

arts.ttl: Leeds United fans pay touching tribute to young supporter following tragic death
arts.sum: Leeds United have paid an emotional tribute at Elland Road to a young fan following his tragic death. Before his death, Leeds United had the honour of showing Jayden and his family around the Thorp Arch training ground.

arts.ttl: Chris Waddle compares Leeds United star to Harry Kane as clear Joel Piroe demand made
arts.sum: Despite his fine goal-scoring form, former Leeds midfielder Stuart Dallas believes that Piroe can do even more. Chris Waddle has lavished praise on Leeds United forward Joel Piroe and even compared him to Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane.

arts.ttl: £100k-a-week star open to joining Leeds in January
arts.sum: Tottenham defender Ben Davies is reportedly open to a transfer to Leeds United this January, according to journalist Ben Jacobs. Spurs no longer tend to use Davies as their first choice, so that could open the door for him to leave the club before the end of this month’s transfer window. Leeds are keen on […] The post £100k-a-week star open to joining Leeds in January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Sheffield Wednesday as Daniel Farke makes Wilfried Gnonto call
arts.sum: Starting XI: Meslier; Bogle, Ampadu, Rodon, Byram; Tanaka, Rothwell; James, Aaronson, Solomon; Piroe. Daniel Farke has decided to bench Wilfried Gnonto as he names his Leeds United starting XI for this afternoon's Championship meeting with Sheffield Wednesday at Elland Road.

arts.ttl: How to watch Leeds United vs Sheffield Wednesday for free - TV channel, live stream, kick off time - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Leeds United are looking to return to the top of the Championship and could restore their place at the summit with a win over Sheffield Wednesday on Sunday. Leeds Live takes a closer look at the TV details as league football returns to Elland Road .

arts.ttl: Sunderland and Leeds United in race for Oxford United man
arts.sum: Sunderland, Leeds United and Coventry City are monitoring Oxford United midfielder Tyler Goodrham, as per Football Insider. Sunderland… The post Sunderland and Leeds United in race for Oxford United man appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United must act on Farke comments by signing PL centre-back that loves him
arts.sum: Leeds United have a new transfer priority to consider much more seriously this week with the fresh injury setback to Pascal Struijk at centre-back. However, Pascal Struijk’s new hamstring setback sees him out for three weeks and therefore sees Leeds short of cover at centre-back.

arts.ttl: Josuha Guilavogui has already provided strong defence for under-fire Leeds United ace
arts.sum: Former Leeds striker Lee Chapman does think it’s a big issue for Joseph not finding goals consistently enough for a team like the Whites, as he spoke to the YEP : “I saw him last year at Chelsea in the fifth round of the FA Cup, and he scored two really well taken goals so he’s got the ability, but he’s got to do it more often when he’s playing for a team like Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Sheffield Wednesday insider's dressing room admission will have Leeds United sniffing blood
arts.sum: For a team sat four points off a play-off place and with so much to play for after making great strides on the pitch this season, you'd think Sheffield Wednesday would be going into tomorrow's match with Leeds United brimming with confidence and excited about the game ahead. A fans forum on Wednesday evening saw the Owls chairman expose a rift between him and manager Danny Rohl, with Chansiri claiming he had not been given a list o any transfers to make this January and saying there had been no communication between the pair since December.
